title: Yume Artifacts
description: Adds effects from Yume Nikki as artifacts!
body:
🛏️ FIRST YUME NIKKI MINECRAFT MOD????????🛏️ this mod adds new items with special abilities found in dungeons, based by the indie rpg psychological horror game "yume nikki" ❗️THIS MOD REQUIRES CURIOS currently with 15 of the 24 artifacts that will be added into the mod, which you find in chests in vanilla structures and also these cannot be crafted. Some artifacts dont have the same effects as the base game, some are different.

🐱 CURRENT ARTIFACTS 🐱 - Medamaude Hand, Teleports you back to your spawn point (a terraria magic mirror type item) - Iron Knife, instantly kills the mob if it haves 10 health - Lantern Head, a mining helmet type item (Dynamic Lights) - Blindfold, Enables the player to look to endermans - Cat Ears, Enables the player to meow when sneaking (Attracts entities to the player) - Triangle Kerchief, Makes the player invisible for 2 seconds when sneaking - Blonde Hair, makes piglins neutral - Long Hair, no special ability - Oni Clothes, gives fire resistance (instead of conjuring lightnings as the original game) - Neon Bottle, changes the screen colors to 4 main colors randomly - Flute, Plays a set of notes when used- Stoplight, gives slowness to mobs near the player - Yukionna Cloak, replaces powder snow to normal snow when you walk in it (instead of making snow fall as the original game)

💀 QUESTIONS💀 This mod will have effects from the Yume 2KKI and .Flow? -probably All Effects will be added? - no, the squishy and midget effects will not be added This mod will update to 1.21 and further versions?? - i will not update any mods for 1.21 and further for now This mod will have versions to 1.19 and prior?? - only 1.19 maybe This mod will have a fabric version? - when i learn how to use trinkets, probably
